title: Purely Umami Chinese Beef Hot Pot
description: A savory and umami-rich Chinese beef hot pot featuring wood-fired baked beef stock concentrate, perfect for a post-workout flexitarian-friendly meal.
instructions: In a large pot, combine the beef stock concentrate and 4 cups of water, then bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer the stock for 10 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the chopped bok choy to the pot and cook until wilted, about 3 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil over medium-high heat, then add the beef slices and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the cooked beef slices to the pot, along with the cubed tofu, chopped green onions, soy sauce, and grated ginger.
Simmer the hot pot for an additional 5 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
Serve the hot pot immediately, allowing each guest to customize their own bowl with their preferred ingredients.
